display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;

span.p:
VoiceOrb
canvas blob animation
6 visual modes

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;

span.p:
AudioWorklet
off-main-thread PCM capture
16kHz mono Int16

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Continuous PCM Streaming
100ms chunk interval
Float32 → Int16 → base64
NO client-side VAD

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Server-Side VAD
Gemini detects speech boundaries
startSensitivity: HIGH
endSensitivity: LOW

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;

span.p:
useStreamingAudio
Web Audio API
gapless PCM playback

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Mute-to-Stop
Tap orb to halt Director
stopStreaming() + abort mic

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Idle Re-Engagement
20s no interaction → nudge
2 nudges max → idle stop

span.p:
Gemini Live Session
gemini-live-2.5-flash-native-audio
+ native tool calling
+ native transcription
+ context compression
+ server-side VAD

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;

span.p:
send_realtime_input()
Streams PCM to Gemini
asyncio.Queue → sender task
concurrent with response collector

generate_story tool
model decides when ready

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 280px; text-align: center;

span.p:
5-Layer Security
Regex pre-screen (26 patterns)
Output post-screen
Identity anchoring
Re-anchor every 5 msgs
Flagged audio kill
